text: The structure was originally developed as two adjacent triplexes circa 1926, but is now fully renovated and reconfigured into a single six-unit apartment building. Upon completion, the property will contain a gross building area of 9,612 square feet, with approximately 8,400 square feet of rentable area. Renovations included comprehensive upgrades to electrical and gas service, forced-air HVAC installation, new windows, plumbing replacement, new bathrooms, full interior modernization (cabinetry, flooring, countertops, finishes), roof and exterior repairs, and tuckpointing.
